chrome_required.title: Chrome Required
chrome_required.description: Web automation tasks require Google Chrome installed on this Mac.

skills.title: Skills
skills.subtitle: Browse the available skills and see what each one is best suited for.
skills.empty: No skills are available right now.
skills.author: Author

chat.placeholder_full: Issue an instruction to Ferryman... (⌘/Ctrl + Enter)
chat.send_shortcut_enter_hint: Enter to send, Shift + Enter for newline

quick_actions.hotspot_prompt: Research the latest AI trends and news, and generate a concise summary report.
quick_actions.scout_prompt: Identify high-potential AI products and business models from various directories.
quick_actions.keyword_prompt: Perform deep SEO keyword research for geosolver.app, analyze competitors, and provide an action plan.
quick_actions.backlink_prompt: Discover free, replicable, and high-value backlink submission opportunities for geosolver.app.
quick_actions.stock_prompt: Help me figure out whether Tencent is worth buying right now.
quick_actions.daily_dashboard_prompt: Build me a daily planning tool with voice task input, reminders for the top 3 most important things, and simple stats.

insights.title: Session Insights
insights.subtitle: Review token trends and memory state for the current session.
insights.memory_subtitle: Current memory snapshot and compaction summary.
insights.no_usage: No token records in this range
insights.no_memory: This session has no saved memory yet.

settings.subtitle: Manage model access and runtime settings in one place.
settings.providers_subtitle: Configure provider endpoints and API credentials.
settings.logs_subtitle: Inspect backend service activity and startup details.
settings.setup_welcome_title: Connect Ferryman to a model first
settings.setup_status_title: Model setup needs one more step
settings.setup_no_runnable_model: Enter a model API key, then choose the model Ferryman should use.
settings.setup_missing_api_key: The selected model is missing its API key. Finish that provider setup, then come back to chat.
settings.setup_missing_base_url: The selected model is missing its base URL. Add the endpoint first, then continue.
settings.setup_active_model_invalid: There is no valid active model yet. Finish provider setup below, then choose the model Ferryman should use.
settings.setup_welcome_hint: Once setup is done, you can head back to chat whenever you want.
settings.inline_model_hint: Enter a model API key below first, then choose the model Ferryman should use here.
settings.inline_select_model_hint: Your available models are loaded. Choose the one Ferryman should use here.
settings.inline_missing_base_url_hint: Add the base URL first, then choose the model Ferryman should use here.

tasks.title: Tasks
tasks.subtitle: Review, edit, and clean up persistent work items.
tasks.select_empty: Select a task to view details.
tasks.delete_description: “{name}” and its saved execution context will be deleted. This cannot be undone.
tasks.empty: There are no tasks right now.

schedules.title: Schedules
schedules.subtitle: Manage workflows that run automatically on a recurring cadence.
schedules.empty: There are no schedules right now.
schedules.select_empty: Select a schedule to view details.
schedules.timezone_hint: Example: Asia/Shanghai. Leave blank to use the machine default timezone.
schedules.delete_description: “{name}” will no longer run automatically. This cannot be undone.
